Sally's SciFi Adventure

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš element p postavljen unutar elementa sa klasom card.
Tekst vašeg elementa p treba da bude This is an epic story of Sally and her dog Rex as they navigate through other worlds.
tests.testString: assert.equal(document.querySelector('.card p')?.innerText.trim(), "This is an epic story of Sally and her dog Rex as they navigate through other worlds.");

tests.text: Vaš element za p mora biti ispod vašeg elementa za h2.

description:
Ispod elementa h2 u prvom elementu sa klasom card, dodajte element p sa sledećim tekstom:

This is an epic story of Sally and her dog Rex as they navigate through other worlds.
